extortion.description: Len Dubois Trucking - Transport Service Provider. Today, Len Dubois Trucking Inc. operates 50+ company trucks and owner/operators in Manitoba. Travels are approximately 75% in the U.S., with hauling capabilities that include Full Truck Loads, Less than Truck Loads, Hazardous Materials, Special Commodities, Antiques, and pretty much whatever will fit in the trailer.
